description: No Protobuf serializer implementation exists. gRPCRequest in request_types.py has no binary codec. Limits gRPC and inter-language scenarios to JSON only.
proposed_solution:
Add ProtobufSerializer implementing ISerializer; generate Python protobuf stubs; extend SerializerType enum; integrate with PipelineConfig for automatic selection,false,0.4.1.5.f protobuf_serializer.py,true,presentation/codecs/
PMC-002,presentation_L6,MsgPackSerializer,No MessagePack serializer exists. MsgPack is more compact than JSON for binary payloads and essential for high-throughput WebSocket/gRPC-streaming scenarios where wire size matters."
appropriate_location:
Add MsgPackSerializer via msgpack library implementing ISerializer; add to codecs/ package; support native dict/list/bytes serialization without BaseModel constraint,false,0.4.1.6.f msgpack_serializer.py,true,presentation/codecs/
PMC-003,presentation_L6,CBORSerializer,No CBOR serializer exists. CBOR (RFC 8949) is IETF standard for concise binary representation required for IoT/COSE/CWT constrained environments."
column16:
Add CBORSerializer via cbor2 library implementing ISerializer; add to codecs/ package and SerializerType enum,false,0.4.1.7.f cbor_serializer.py,true,presentation/codecs/
PMC-004,presentation_L6,AvroSerializer,No Apache Avro serializer exists. Required for schema-registry ecosystems (Kafka
column17: Hadoop) with schema evolution support. Schema registry integration would enable forward/backward compatibility."
column21:
Add AvroSerializer with avro library; implement schema registry integration; add schema versioning fingerprint to serialized bytes for evolvability,false,0.4.1.8.f avro_serializer.py,true,presentation/codecs/
PMC-005,presentation_L6,ContentTypeAnalyzer,No adaptive compression algorithm selector exists. CompressionAdapter uses fixed algorithm set at init. Cannot dynamically select gzip for HTML/text vs zstd for binary blobs based on content type or payload size."
column25:
Add ContentTypeAnalyzer that reads magic bytes and content-type headers to select optimal algorithm + compression level; integrate into CompressionAdapter.compress decision path,false,0.4.1.9.f content_type_analyzer.py,true,presentation/codecs/
PMC-006,presentation_L6,SnappyCompressionAdapter,No Snappy compression support exists. Snappy (google-snappy) is designed for high-speed/low-CPU compression ideal for latency-critical streaming where gzip/zstd overhead degrades throughput."
column29:
Add Snappy to CompressionAlgorithm enum; implement snappy compress/decompress via python-snappy; select automatically for streaming paths via ContentTypeAnalyzer,true,0.4.1.2.f compression.py,false,
PMC-007,presentation_L6,CharsetNormalizer,No charset detection or conversion exists. PipelineConfig.charset defaults to utf-8 but is only used in encode_stream bypass. Incoming Shift-JIS
column31: or other encodings arrive untransformed. SSEStreamCodec._parse_sse_frame uses errors='replace' causing silent data loss."
column35: Add chardet-based charset detection; add iconv/conversion between source encoding and utf-8 in pipeline.decode and decode_stream; make config-disablable via PipelineConfig,true,0.4.1.2.f compression.py,false, (Note: CharsetNormalizer is separate from compression - should be 0.4.1.10.f)
